svg.title: Setup phase detailed workflow for days 1 to 2
svg.desc: Detailed breakdown of the setup phase showing dataset download, repo structure, preprocessing pipeline, stratified re-split, and EDA tasks with sub-steps and dependencies.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the code for downloading and verifying the Kaggle chest X-ray dataset')
sendPrompt('Show me the recommended repo folder structure for this project')
sendPrompt('Show me the code for merging and stratified re-splitting the dataset 80/10/10')
sendPrompt('Show me the PyTorch transforms code for the preprocessing pipeline')
sendPrompt('Show me the resize and normalisation code')
sendPrompt('Show me the ImageNet normalisation values')
sendPrompt('Show me the data augmentation transforms for chest X-rays')
sendPrompt('Show me the class weight calculation for weighted loss')

g.text: Train only — no augment on val/test

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the PyTorch DataLoader setup with batch size and workers')
sendPrompt('Show me the EDA code for class distribution bar charts')
sendPrompt('Show me the code for visualising sample X-ray images from each class')
sendPrompt('Show me the code for computing image size and pixel intensity stats')
sendPrompt('Show me the code for a pipeline sanity check with a single batch')
sendPrompt('Show me the MLflow or W&B setup code for experiment tracking')

g.text: • Log test run with dummy metrics
